description_long: This is a large, modern performance stage with a prominent central circular platform and two smaller side platforms, all outlined with glowing purple accent lights. The stage backdrop features a wide, high-resolution LED screen flanked by vertical lighting columns and truss structures, suggesting a setup for concerts or large public events. The main stage area is elevated and extends forward with a curved front edge, providing ample space for performers. The surrounding area is enclosed by a dark, angular structure that frames the stage and likely serves as a roof or partial enclosure. The materials appear to be primarily metal and composite panels, with integrated lighting and electronic display components. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban entertainment venues or outdoor festivals.
description: A large, modern performance stage with glowing purple accents, a central circular platform, and a wide LED screen backdrop, framed by a dark angular enclosure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular enclosure and the edge of the circular platform with purple lighting.
description_view_1: Front view revealing the full stage layout, central and side platforms, LED screen, and lighting trusses.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the enclosure and side platform.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid, enclosed back of the stage with minimal visible detail.
